platform.framework: Electron (dev-mode source-loaded, or a locally-built unsigned Forge package when present)

redaction_policy: Smoke receipts assert only public-safe fields (dispatchedLane, phase markers); no transcript or credential content.
retention: Ephemeral per-run temp user-data directory; stdout phase-b JSON receipt lines are the retained evidence artifact.
known_capability_gap: signing_unverified: this profile does NOT prove a signed/notarized build. apps/openagents-desktop/scripts/full-auto-restart-smoke.ts prefers a locally-built Forge package at out/OpenAgents-darwin-arm64/OpenAgents.app ONLY IF it already exists (requires a prior separate build+package step); otherwise it falls back to unsigned dev-mode `electron .`. Neither path invokes apps/oa-updates/docs/release-signing-runbook.md. Evidence from this profile is RISK-FA-10-scoped: real two-OS-process, real Electron, but not release-grade.
notes: The smoke harness also drives an in-app OPENAGENTS_DESKTOP_FULL_AUTO_RESTART_PROBE special-case code path for seeding/asserting phase state -- this is a smoke fixture affordance baked into the main process, not ordinary production behavior under test by itself.
